codeReview.summary: The fix correctly addresses both blocking issues from the prior synthesis: (1) LLM backends now call record_llm_cost() after successful API calls, and (2) the daemon main.rs now subscribes to OrchestratorEvent::AgentRegistered and forwards to DashboardState::register_agent(). The thread-safety issue with UnsafeCell was fixed by using Mutex<String> for last_model field.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The event wiring between orchestrator and dashboard using broadcast channels follows established patterns in the codebase. No new conventions introduced.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: main.rs uses orch.subscribe() and broadcast::Receiver pattern consistent with other event handling in the codebase

summary: Pass - The fix correctly wires live LLM cost tracking and agent registration into the dashboard. Both GLOBAL_COST_TRACKER (now in swell-core) is updated from anthropic.rs and openai.rs after successful chat() calls, and DashboardState::register_agent() is called from a tokio task that subscribes to OrchestratorEvent::AgentRegistered in main.rs. Cost sync runs periodically every 5 seconds. All tests pass (62 swell-daemon, 20 swell-llm) and clippy shows no warnings.
